data.title: OKEA ASA Announces Significant Oil Discoveries at Brage Field
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) just unveiled an update.

OKEA ASA has announced significant oil discoveries in the Talisker exploration well at the Brage field, with commercial potential estimated between 16 – 33 mmboe. This discovery aligns with OKEA’s strategy to leverage existing infrastructure and subsurface knowledge, potentially extending the Brage field’s operational lifespan and enhancing its value.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a leading mid- and late-life operator on the Norwegian continental shelf (NCS), known for its strategy of finding value where others divest. The company focuses on growth, value creation, and capital discipline, and is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Kogan.com Implements Financial Strategies Amidst Market Changes
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Kogan.com ( (AU:KGN) ) is now available.

Kogan.com has implemented forward exchange contracts to manage inventory purchases in foreign currencies, opting not to adopt hedge accounting. This decision impacts the company’s financial statements as movements in fair value are recorded in the income statement. Additionally, Kogan.com has engaged in a share buy-back program, purchasing $11.16 million worth of shares in FY25, which reduces issued capital and affects shareholder equity.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:KGN) stock is a Buy with a A$7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kogan.com stock, see the AU:KGN Stock Forecast page.

data.description:

Net Protections Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:7383) ) has provided an update.

Net Protections Holdings, Inc. has announced corrections to its consolidated financial results for the three months ended June 30, 2025. The corrections were necessary due to errors in the percentage changes of the forecasted results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, which were initially based on incorrect earnings forecasts. The revised forecasts show significant increases in key financial metrics, indicating a stronger than anticipated financial performance, which may positively impact the company’s market position and stakeholder confidence.

data.title: Vital Metals Addresses ASX Inquiry Amidst Rare Earths Market Surge
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Vital Metals Ltd ( (AU:VML) ) has issued an announcement.

Vital Metals Ltd responded to an ASX inquiry regarding a recent increase in the price and volume of its securities. The company attributed this change to the finalization of a capital raise and the release of a positive scoping study, which highlighted robust financial outcomes. Additionally, the company noted that the broader market interest in rare earths companies and its own low market capitalization may have contributed to the trading activity. Vital Metals confirmed its compliance with ASX listing rules and emphasized that its board had authorized the responses.

More about Vital Metals Ltd

Vital Metals Ltd is a company operating in the rare earths industry, focusing on the exploration and development of rare earth elements. The company is engaged in activities that position it within a market experiencing a resurgence in interest and pricing, particularly among other rare earth companies.

data.title: NIBE Industrier Appoints Claes Hemberg as Energy Economist
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

NIBE Industrier AB ( ($SE:NIBE.B) ) has shared an announcement.

NIBE Industrier has appointed Claes Hemberg as the Energy Economist to enhance public education on energy and economics, focusing on Sweden, the UK, and Germany. Hemberg’s extensive background in journalism and economics will aid in addressing household concerns about energy and economic issues, aiming to improve electricity usage and investment both at home and in society.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:NIBE.B) stock is a Buy with a SEK53.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NIBE Industrier AB stock, see the SE:NIBE.B Stock Forecast page.

More about NIBE Industrier AB

NIBE Group is an international company focused on reducing carbon footprints and enhancing energy utilization. It operates in three main business areas: Climate Solutions, Element, and Stoves, providing environmentally friendly solutions for indoor climate comfort, energy-efficient components, and intelligent heating and control solutions for industry and infrastructure. Founded over 70 years ago in Markaryd, Sweden, NIBE has grown into a global entity with approximately 20,600 employees, emphasizing sustainable product development and strategic acquisitions. The company is listed on the Nasdaq Nordic Large Cap and the SIX Swiss Exchange.

data.title: MIXI Australia Rejects betr’s Offer for PointsBet, Stalemate Ensues
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

PointsBet Holdings ( (AU:PBH) ) has provided an update.

MIXI Australia Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of MIXI, Inc, has announced that it will not accept the all-scrip offer from betr for PointsBet shares, impacting betr’s ability to acquire full control of PointsBet Holdings Limited. This decision prevents betr from achieving its goal of acquiring 90% or more of PointsBet shares, thereby hindering its plans for compulsory acquisition and realization of estimated synergies. Conversely, betr has also stated it will not accept MIXI’s offer, which means MIXI Australia cannot increase its offer price as planned, maintaining the offer at $1.25 cash per share.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PBH) stock is a Hold with a A$1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PointsBet Holdings stock, see the AU:PBH Stock Forecast page.

More about PointsBet Holdings

PointsBet Holdings Limited operates in the sports betting and gaming industry, offering a range of wagering products and services. The company focuses on providing innovative betting solutions and has a significant presence in the Australian market.

YTD Price Performance: 25.50%

Average Trading Volume: 970,332

data.title: Butn Limited Achieves Record Revenue and Positive Cash Flow in FY25
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Butn Limited ( (AU:BTN) ) has provided an announcement.

Butn Limited reported significant financial growth for the fiscal year 2025, achieving record revenue of $14.6 million, an 8% increase from the previous year, and a maiden positive operating cash flow of $1.7 million. The company also saw a 19% rise in platform originations, underscoring its strong position in the SME community. Strategic developments included launching a Retail Private Credit Fund, entering the APAC crypto-backed lending market, and securing a $100 million debt facility to support scalable growth. These achievements reflect Butn’s operational discipline and strategic focus, positioning it for continued growth and value creation for shareholders.

More about Butn Limited

Butn Limited is a company that operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing embedded funding technology solutions. The company primarily serves small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) by offering asset-backed lending opportunities and platform-based financial services.

Elliptic Laboratories AS ( (DE:EIP) ) has shared an update.

Elliptic Labs has signed a multi-year agreement with a current laptop customer to expand its AI Virtual Smart Sensor Platform to include PC accessories. This agreement strengthens Elliptic Labs’ position in the AI PC market, allowing them to scale their platform across more devices and operating systems, and demonstrates the customer’s commitment to integrating Elliptic Labs’ technology as a key component of their future interoperability solutions.

More about Elliptic Laboratories AS

Elliptic Labs is a global AI software company headquartered in Norway, specializing in AI Virtual Smart Sensors. Their technology enhances user experiences by utilizing deep neural networks to create AI-powered sensors that improve personalization, privacy, and productivity. The company is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and has a presence in the USA, China, South Korea, Taiwan, and Japan.
